privacyPolicy.pageDescription: Privacy policy and data protection information for Sanad platform.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: Comprehensive Legal Documentation – Privacy Policy, Disclaimer, Cookies Policy

dataController.title: Data Controller
dataController.content: Your data is managed by: PASS TECHNOLOGY – CN-2797749, Abu Dhabi – United Arab Emirates.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.itemA: Name, phone number, service details, location (with consent), images/documents
dataCollected.itemB: Time, order status, provider location, arrival time, ratings
dataCollected.itemC: IP address, device and browser, performance and browsing information, cookies
dataCollected.item25: We collect and process: identity data, legal documents, GPS during service, check-in/out logs, before/after photos, invoices, customer ratings, performance data, complaints. We use them for quality verification, fraud prevention, performance management, dispute resolution, and regulatory compliance. Retention: 5 years from end of contractual relationship.

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Collection
legalBasis.content: Under local law: service performance, consent, legitimate interest, legal compliance.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.intro: With service providers; payment gateways; hosting providers; government authorities when required; analytics providers. (We do not sell your data)

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.content: Messages may be processed via Meta servers under their policies.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.intro: We retain data only as long as necessary for operations, legal compliance, or dispute resolution. Thereafter it is deleted or anonymized.

userRights.title: User Rights
userRights.content: You may request: access, correction, deletion, withdrawal of consent, objection to processing.

children.title: Children
children.content: The service is for adults; children’s services only with guardian request.

crossBorder.title: Cross-Border Data Transfer
crossBorder.content: Data may be hosted outside the country, with appropriate safeguards.

globalRights.title: Your Global Privacy Rights
globalRights.item121: Right of access (Art. 15), rectification (16), erasure (17), restriction (18), portability (20), objection (21), withdrawal of consent (7)
globalRights.item122: Right to know, delete, correct, opt out of “sale” or “sharing,” non-discrimination
globalRights.item123: Right to request confirmation of processing; obtain a copy; correct, complete, or delete; object to marketing processing

retentionPeriods.title: Data Retention Periods
retentionPeriods.item1: Account data: 3 years after last activity
retentionPeriods.item2: Transaction data: 7 years for tax purposes
retentionPeriods.item4: Browsing data: up to 13 months from last visit
retentionPeriods.item5: Provider data: 5 years after relationship ends
retentionPeriods.item6: We retain data only as long as necessary for the stated purposes

dpo.title: Data Protection Officer
dpo.p1: Sanad has appointed a Data Protection Officer (DPO) to oversee compliance.
dpo.item2b: Address: PASS TECHNOLOGY, Abu Dhabi, UAE

internationalTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.p1: Data may be transferred outside the UAE for storage or processing.
internationalTransfers.p2: We ensure protection via: adequacy decisions, standard contractual clauses, binding corporate rules, explicit consent.
internationalTransfers.p3: We provide details on recipient countries and safeguards upon request.

breachDisclosure.title: Data Breach Disclosure
breachDisclosure.p1: In case of personal data breach: notify the supervisory authority within 72 hours; notify affected individuals without undue delay.
breachDisclosure.item2: Nature of breach; types of data affected; measures taken; recommendations; contact information
breachDisclosure.p3: We keep records of all breaches for 3 years.

disclaimerPlatform.title: Platform Role Limits
disclaimerPlatform.content: Sanad is not a cleaning/maintenance/cars/translation company… it is a linking platform only.

disclaimerNoAdvice.title: No Advice
disclaimerNoAdvice.content: AI does not provide: legal advice, health advice, diagnosis, financial advice.

disclaimerProvider.title: Provider Liability
disclaimerProvider.content: Any harm, error, or delay is directly the responsibility of the service provider.

disclaimerUserContent.title: User-Generated Content
disclaimerUserContent.content: Sanad is not responsible for: incorrect information, misleading images, inaccurate ratings.

disclaimerAdditional.title: Additional Disclaimers
disclaimerAdditional.p61: The platform may link to third-party sites. We do not control them and are not responsible for content accuracy, availability, security, or any harm from their use.
disclaimerAdditional.p62: We do not verify all information from providers. Users are responsible for verifying qualifications and assessing quality.
disclaimerAdditional.p63: We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, compatibility with all devices, or protection from viruses.
disclaimerAdditional.p64: Prices are indicative and may change based on additional details, provider assessment, or scope changes.

cookiesWhat.title: What Are Cookies?
cookiesWhat.content: Small storage files used for operation, analytics, security, and performance.

cookiesTypes.title: Types
cookiesTypes.itemB: b) Analytics: Google Analytics or similar

cookiesManaging.title: Managing Cookies
cookiesManaging.content: Browser settings or in-site consent settings.

cookiesThirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
cookiesThirdParty.content: May include: Google, Meta, marketing tools, CDNs.

cookiesTechnical.title: Technical Details of Cookies
cookiesTechnical.p61: Session cookies: session only. Persistent: essential as needed; analytics up to 24 months; marketing up to 13 months; functional up to 12 months.
cookiesTechnical.p62: Consent tool; browser settings; written request to info@trysanad.ai
cookiesTechnical.p63: Some features may be unavailable; loss of preferences; continued non-personalized ads.

contact.title: Legal Contact Information
contact.address: Address: Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
contact.hours: Business Hours: Sunday – Thursday, 9 AM – 5 PM (UAE time)

termsOfService.pageDescription: Terms of service and usage agreement for Sanad platform.
termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.subtitle: Comprehensive Legal Documentation for Sanad Platform

owner.title: Owner
owner.content: This platform is owned and operated by: PASS TECHNOLOGY. Economic License No.: CN-2797749. Registered in Abu Dhabi – United Arab Emirates. It is referred to in this document as "Sanad" or "the Platform" or "we".

definitions.title: Definitions
definitions.item1: "Sanad" or "the Platform": The Sanad platform owned by PASS TECHNOLOGY – License No. CN-2797749.
definitions.item2: "User": Any individual or entity using the Platform, providing data, or creating a service request.
definitions.item3: "Service Provider": Any individual or entity connected to the User via the Platform to perform the requested service.
definitions.item4: "Service": Any service requested or performed through the Platform.
definitions.item5: "Request": Any service request created via the Platform or WhatsApp.
definitions.item6: "Fees": All costs arising from the service, including service price, taxes, cancellation fees, and no-show fees.
definitions.item7: "Content": Any data, images, correspondence, or materials provided by the User or Provider to the Platform.
definitions.item8: "Third Party": Any entity other than the User, Provider, and Platform, such as payment gateways or government authorities.
definitions.item9: "Service Credit": A sum or value granted by the Platform to the User in specified cases, not transferable or redeemable for cash.

scope.title: Scope of Agreement
scope.intro: This agreement governs your use of the Sanad platform via:

amendments.title: Amendments to Terms
amendments.content: Sanad may amend the terms at any time; the page will be updated with the last update date. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

natureOfService.title: Nature of Service and Sanad's Role
natureOfService.content: Sanad is a technology platform connecting customers with service providers. Sanad does not provide services itself nor is it an employer of providers. Sanad's role: technical mediation + order management + support + ratings. Direct responsibility for service delivery lies with the service provider.

accountCreation.title: Account Creation / Use
accountCreation.outro: You must provide accurate data and update it when it changes.

ordersPricing.title: Orders and Pricing
ordersPricing.item1: Prices may be: indicative, dynamic, inspection-based, or depend on time / distance / materials
ordersPricing.item2: Final price is shown before confirmation whenever possible
ordersPricing.item3: Some services may require: prepayment, visit fees, urgent-service fees

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use Policy
acceptableUse.intro: This policy aims to ensure lawful, safe, and responsible use of the Sanad platform.
acceptableUse.item81a: a) Illegal activities: requesting or providing services that violate UAE law, using the Platform for fraud, attempting to circumvent government authorities
acceptableUse.item81b: b) Abuse or verbal violence: threats, insults, racism, harassment, bullying
acceptableUse.item81c: c) Technical misuse: hacking the Platform, distributing malware, using bots for automated requests, disrupting servers
acceptableUse.item81d: d) Prohibited content: sharing illegal images, sensitive information without permission, third-party personal data
acceptableUse.item81e: e) Provider misuse: requesting work outside the agreement, forcing lower prices, non-payment of dues
acceptableUse.sub82: Sanctions: Sanad may take any of the following actions:

paymentRefund.title: Payment and Refund Policy
paymentRefund.item91b: Card / Apple Pay / Google Pay (when available)
paymentRefund.item91e: (PASS TECHNOLOGY does not store any credit card information)
paymentRefund.item92a: Cancellation before provider acceptance: no fees; cancellation is immediate
paymentRefund.item92b: Cancellation after provider acceptance: service fees may apply, including travel, waiting time, materials purchased
paymentRefund.item92c: Cancellation upon provider arrival: if the customer is not available at the service location → "no-show" fees apply
paymentRefund.item93a: Users may request a refund when: provider did not arrive, proven damages, service not provided, technical error by the Platform
paymentRefund.item93b: Refund is not available when: late cancellation, non-cooperation with provider, denying provider access, false information to provider, fully consumed services
paymentRefund.item93c: Refund process: review takes 3–7 business days; response via WhatsApp or email; transfer to same payment method
paymentRefund.p94: Financial Disputes: Any financial dispute is subject to the "Dispute Resolution" policy in the Terms of Service.
paymentRefund.item95a: Sanad may, at its sole discretion, withhold part of the order value as temporary security upon completion, for a period it determines, to settle any disputes or complaints regarding service quality.
paymentRefund.item95b: Sanad may withhold payments due to the provider when: (a) a complaint is under investigation, (b) suspected fraud or breach of terms, (c) upon request by a judicial or regulatory authority.
paymentRefund.item95c: Final payments are transferred to the provider after the security period and fulfillment of all Platform requirements; Sanad is not liable for any losses from this delay.
paymentRefund.item95d: Sanad is not a financial institution; withheld funds are for procedural purposes only to ensure performance of the contract between customer and provider.

providerPolicy.title: Provider Responsibility and Compliance Policy
providerPolicy.intro: This policy applies to all service providers operating via the Sanad platform.
providerPolicy.sub101: Qualifications and Requirements: The provider must:
providerPolicy.item101a: Hold a valid commercial license (when required)
providerPolicy.item101c: Submit certificates related to the nature of the service (if legally required)
providerPolicy.item102d: Not request additional amounts outside the Platform without cause
providerPolicy.item102f: Provide a clear invoice when requested
providerPolicy.sub103: Safety: The provider is responsible for:
providerPolicy.item103c: Compliance with health and safety procedures
providerPolicy.item103d: Reporting any hazards at the customer's site
providerPolicy.sub104: Damages and Compensation: The provider bears full responsibility for:
providerPolicy.item104e: (PASS TECHNOLOGY is not liable for such damages)
providerPolicy.sub105: Termination of Partnership: Sanad may terminate a provider's partnership when:
providerPolicy.p106a: The provider must not cancel a request after acceptance except for emergency or justified reasons.
providerPolicy.p106b: If the provider cancels without valid reason: points are deducted from their rating, their account may be suspended, Sanad reserves the right to terminate the partnership.
providerPolicy.p106c: The customer may receive: free rescheduling or Service Credit as determined by Sanad.
providerPolicy.p106d: Repeated cancellation by the same provider results in placement on the provider blacklist.
providerPolicy.p107a: Sanad assists you, under UAE law, in obtaining a valid tax record and approved electronic invoice when requested.
providerPolicy.p107b: Full responsibility for VAT and other financial compliance lies with the service provider as independent tax responsible, not Sanad.
providerPolicy.p107c: Sanad bears no legal or financial consequences from any breach or delay by the provider in meeting tax obligations or issuing correct invoices.
providerPolicy.p108a: The provider acknowledges that they are solely responsible for obtaining all required licenses, permits, and approvals in the geographical areas they cover.
providerPolicy.p108b: Sanad acts only as a technical intermediary and does not verify completeness or validity of such licenses. The customer is responsible for verifying the provider's legal eligibility.
providerPolicy.p108c: If the provider breaches any local regulations, full legal and administrative responsibility lies with them; Sanad cooperates with authorities upon request.

serviceQuality.title: Service Quality and Reviews
serviceQuality.content: Sanad operates a rigorous rating system. It may suspend or restrict providers based on quality. Before/after photos may be requested from the provider to confirm service delivery.

aiPolicy.title: AI Safety and Usage Policy
aiPolicy.sub121: Role of AI on the Platform: Sanad uses AI for:
aiPolicy.item122e: Provides initial support based on input data
aiPolicy.p123: You must verify the accuracy of information generated by AI. The user is responsible for final decisions. Do not rely on AI for sensitive decisions.
aiPolicy.p124: AI models are not trained on personal conversations. Data is not sold or shared.
aiPolicy.p125: AI may be used to analyze patterns to: improve quality, detect fraud, enhance user experience.
aiPolicy.sub126: Use of Conversations and Recordings for Quality Assurance and AI Training
aiPolicy.p126: Some interactions — after de-identifying the user — may be used to improve AI models, quality systems, classification accuracy, and recommendations. No personally identifiable data is used for model training without consent. Users may opt out of this non-essential use via privacy@trysanad.ai

liabilityLimits.title: Limitation of Liability
liabilityLimits.intro: To the extent permitted by law:
liabilityLimits.item1: Sanad is not liable for the acts of service providers
liabilityLimits.item2: We do not bear indirect, consequential, loss of profits, or data loss
liabilityLimits.item3: Maximum financial liability does not exceed the fees paid to the Platform for the relevant request
liabilityLimits.p133a: Service delivery is entirely the responsibility of the service provider, not Sanad or PASS TECHNOLOGY.
liabilityLimits.p133b: In any dispute regarding service quality, content, timing, or resulting harm: legal and financial responsibility passes directly to the service provider.
liabilityLimits.p133c: Sanad is not liable for: the provider adding/changing scope of work, use of unsuitable materials, execution errors, delayed arrival.
liabilityLimits.p133d: Sanad only manages the report and assists both parties in resolving the dispute, without commitment to a specific outcome.
liabilityLimits.p134a: The Platform and related services are provided "as is" and "as available." Sanad gives no warranties of any kind, express or implied.
liabilityLimits.p134b: Sanad is not liable for damage from: service interruption, technical errors, system updates, third-party network failures.

forceMajeure.title: Force Majeure
forceMajeure.intro: Sanad is not liable for any delay or failure due to:

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity Policy
cybersecurity.p151: To protect user and provider data and ensure secure operation of the Sanad platform.
cybersecurity.item153b: Not share the account with anyone
cybersecurity.p155: In the event of a breach: investigation is immediate, affected systems are isolated, users are notified (as required by law), corrective measures are taken.
cybersecurity.p156: PASS TECHNOLOGY trains staff on: data protection, handling sensitive information, phishing awareness.
cybersecurity.p157: Encrypted backups are taken periodically to ensure: no data loss, recovery in disasters.

arbitration.title: Arbitration and Dispute Resolution
arbitration.p161: Dispute Resolution: You agree to first seek to resolve any dispute through good-faith negotiation with Sanad within 30 days of written notice.
arbitration.p162: Arbitration: If unresolved, the dispute is referred to final and binding arbitration under ICC rules in Abu Dhabi. A single arbitrator is appointed under ICC rules.
arbitration.p163: Waiver of Class Actions: Both User and Sanad waive any right to bring or participate in any class action or representative action.
arbitration.p164: Governing Law: This agreement is governed by the laws of Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.
arbitration.p165: Jurisdiction: The parties agree that exclusive jurisdiction for any dispute arising from this agreement lies with the courts of Abu Dhabi.

suspension.title: Suspension and Termination
suspension.p171: Sanad may suspend, terminate, or restrict your access immediately and without prior notice if: you breach any term, we suspect fraud or misuse, for security or operational reasons, or upon request by a competent government authority.
suspension.p172: Upon termination: all licenses granted to you are cancelled, Sanad may permanently bar your access, terms that by nature survive termination remain in effect.
suspension.p173: You may submit a written appeal of a termination decision within 14 days of notice.

minors.title: Minor Users
minors.item1: The service is intended for individuals aged 18 or older
minors.item2: By using the service, you confirm that you are at least 18
minors.item3: Sanad does not knowingly collect personal information from anyone under 18
minors.item4: If you are under 18, you must have parental or legal guardian consent

communications.title: Communications and Notices
communications.item1: Electronic Communications: You agree to receive all legally binding communications from Sanad electronically
communications.item2: Validity of Electronic Notices: Electronic notices are deemed written and satisfy any legal requirement for written communication
communications.item3: Formal Notices: Any legal notices to Sanad must be sent to the physical address set out below

ipRights.title: Intellectual Property Rights
ipRights.item1: Sanad's Ownership: All IP rights in the Platform, including logos, content, design, software, and database, are exclusively owned by PASS TECHNOLOGY
ipRights.item2: Limited License: Sanad grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the service for personal purposes
ipRights.item3: Restrictions: Copying, modifying, distributing, selling, or exploiting any part of the service without prior written permission is prohibited
ipRights.item4: User-Generated Content: By uploading content, you grant Sanad a worldwide license to use it to provide the service

indemnity.title: Indemnity
indemnity.intro: You agree to indemnify Sanad, PASS TECHNOLOGY, and their officers and agents against any claims, losses, damages, or costs (including legal fees) arising from:
indemnity.item1: Your breach of any term of this agreement.
indemnity.item2: Misuse of the Platform or services.
indemnity.item4: Damage or disputes from direct dealings between you and a service provider outside the Platform.
indemnity.outro: This clause does not cover liability arising from Sanad's gross negligence or bad faith.

lawJurisdiction.title: Law and Jurisdiction
lawJurisdiction.content: This agreement is governed by the laws of Abu Dhabi / United Arab Emirates. Jurisdiction lies with the courts of Abu Dhabi.

severability.title: Severability
severability.content: If any term is held illegal or unenforceable, it is construed to the extent necessary to make it enforceable, or is deemed deleted, without affecting the rest.

noWaiver.title: No Waiver
noWaiver.content: Sanad's failure or delay in exercising any right under this agreement does not constitute a waiver of that right, nor preclude its future exercise.

languagePrevails.title: Governing Language (Arabic Prevails)
languagePrevails.content: The Arabic version of these terms and policies is the original and governing version. In case of conflict with any translation, the Arabic version prevails.

contact.title: Legal Contact Information
contact.address: Address: Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
contact.hours: Business Hours: Sunday – Thursday, 9 AM – 5 PM (UAE time)
